topic: WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How)

sections.title: WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How) — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How) — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How) is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: WH word + auxiliary verb + subject + main verb (question formation). Rules: 'What' asks about things, 'Who/Whom' about people, 'Where' about place | 'When' asks about time, 'Why' about reason, 'How' about manner/way | 'Whose' asks about possession, 'Which' asks to choose among options | WH word always comes first in the question
sections.formula: WH word + auxiliary verb + subject + main verb (question formation)

sections.formula: WH word + auxiliary verb + subject + main verb (question formation)

examples.hindi: तुम्हें कौन सी किताब पसंद है?
तुम किससे बात कर रहे हो?
